summary: A young American tank commander should be trained to observe, report, coordinate, and conserve the platoon picture, not merely to drive or shoot.
source_basis: FM 17-33 The Tank Battalion, Light and Medium
simulation_implications: Training raises commander_training_level, radio_reliability use, and report_accuracy.
Early play should punish solo heroics and reward a clean report chain.
game_implications: Start with narrow awareness and incomplete doctrine; unlock broader control through drill and experience.
Teach the player to use map/report view and radio procedures as a combat tool.
